---
description: "Scaffold a React component with props, tests, and accessibility defaults."
name: "Scaffold React Component"
argument-hint: "ComponentName plus optional notes"
agent: "agent"
---

Create a new React component scaffold using this input: ${input:ComponentName and optional notes}

Requirements:
- Add a typed props interface.
- Include semantic and accessible markup.
- Create a matching test file with at least one behavior test and one accessibility-oriented assertion.
- Match naming and folder conventions already used in this repository.
- Keep output minimal and production-ready.
